settings.editor: We are a Solar Energy Installation and Maintenance Provider, delivering renewable and sustainable energy solutions for a better quality of life and a greener future.

settings.title: To accelerate the transition to a greener planet by delivering high-quality, cost-effective solar solutions.

settings.editor: Sunexia provide innovative, efficient, and sustainable solar energy solutions to help homes and businesses reduce costs and transition to a cleaner future.

settings.title: To be a global leader in renewable energy, empowering communities with sustainable and intelligent energy.

Bring Clean Energy Into Every Modern Space

settings.editor: To reduce high energy consumption and stabilize daily operations, Sunexia Cold Storage integrated a high-efficiency 350 kW solar power system combined with smart battery backup to support their refrigeration units and critical equipment.
Urban Logistics Hub partnered with us to install a large-scale solar array and backup power system to stabilize energy costs and ensure resilience for their critical 24/7 warehouse operations.
AquaStream partnered with us to achieve energy independence and cut high operational costs at their main water treatment facility, aligning with their commitment to sustainable resources.
